customOptions.name: packageScope
customOptions.message: npm scope for workspace packages (e.g. `@afenda/`). Leave blank for unscoped packages.

customOptions.name: srcDir
customOptions.message: Subdirectory for the web app source (e.g. `src`). Leave blank for root.

customOptions.name: projectImportPath
customOptions.message: Import alias for the web app, e.g. `@/`
